prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 96.2 kg; Height 177.3 cm; BMI 30.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.9%; 9 months ago 11.5%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 320mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 256mg/dL; 3 months ago 229mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 95.7kg; 9 months ago 92.8kg; 6 months ago 93.8kg; 3 months ago 91.1kg; current 96.2kg), Height (12 months ago 177.3cm; 9 months ago 177.3cm; 6 months ago 177.3cm; 3 months ago 177.3cm; current 177.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 232mg/g; 9 months ago 239mg/g; 6 months ago 269mg/g; 3 months ago 206mg/g; current 278mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.06 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
